description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is primarily white with blue accents along the tail, wingtips, and under the wings, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating one or two seats. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration. The overall design suggests a light general aviation aircraft, suitable for personal or training use.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white and blue color scheme, tricycle landing gear, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted wings, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Front-left oblique view highlighting the wing dihedral, blue wingtip accents, and the cockpit's forward placement.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, blue striping along the fuselage and wings, and the tail configuration.
description_view_3: Front-right oblique view showing the right wing, landing gear, and blue tail accent.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
